title: Flan's Mod: Reloaded
description: Flan's Mod: Reloaded is like a library mod, but way cooler. The ultimate toolbox for adding advanced weaponry to your Minecraft world!
body:
# The ultimate toolbox for creating guns in Minecraft.
## Flan's Mod: Reloaded is like a library mod, but way cooler.
Flan's Mod: Reloaded loads from Content Packs you can find here on CurseForge, turning simple JSON files, sounds and textures into a lethal upgrade for your world.
This is the official continuation of Flan's Mod, rewritten from the ground up for a new era of Minecraft.

**Currently, Flan's Mod: Reloaded has the following support:**
Guns and similar tools (binoculars are scoped guns that don't shoot)
Magazines for your guns
Bullets for your magazines
Attachments (barrels, scopes, grips and stocks to modify your guns)
Parts (components to combine to craft everything else in the mod)
Npcs (think wandering traders with a bit more life to them, and a lot more ammunition)
Workbenches (this includes all crafting and gun modifying required for the mod)

**Some things you may recall from Flan's Mod 1.12.2 that are not in yet, but coming soon:**
Vehicles (all planes, tanks, mechas etc combined into one multifunctional type with all the best bits of each)
Armour
Teams, loadouts, multiplayer gamemodes
